turns.user_message: My friend just canceled our plans again without a real reason. I feel like I'm always the one putting in the effort.
I keep noticing how one-sided our conversations have become lately. It's starting to feel like they don't actually want to be around me.
I'm constantly questioning if I've done something wrong to make them pull away. The silence from their end is really getting to me.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This just started recently.
